scripts.test: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true bun test --preload ./src/test/bunSetup.ts ./src/**/*.test.ts ./src/**/*.test.tsx || cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true vitest run
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true BUN_TEST_PRELOAD=./src/test/bunSetup.ts BUN_TEST_PATTERNS=./src/**/*.test.ts,./src/**/*.test.tsx bash ../../scripts/test/runCoverage.sh || cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true vitest run --coverage
